title: Luffy and Law Head for Doflamingo
description: Pages 1–5 focus on luffy and law head for doflamingo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy and Law break through toward the palace, while Cavendish, Kyros, and the allies hold back Doflamingo's forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right, so we're gonna leave this to you, soldier- San!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Luffy and Law, the best tag team,are back in action! Hurry on to the deciding battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then we're off to where Doflamingo is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ya think I'd just let you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Isn't it awe- some that you got to meet your dad!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thanks for the key! I'm off! Be back soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Will you really defeat that Doflamingo for us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm the guy that's gonna become the pirate king!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Like there is any way I'd ever let you set foot in there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: So this is the palace? What a convenient ability!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: But it takes its toll on the body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The fact that I was carried all the way here by you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Was perhaps the silver lining on the clouds of late.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I was able to save my strength.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Have appeared near the pool-area in the garden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: The tens of thousands of toy slaves

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I spent the last ten years diligently creating...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: And just like that, they all disappeared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: revenge will be easy... I only need to touch you with these hands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Your existences... I will... make them disappear for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Do you really get how serious of a situa- tion we're in!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Robin's toy-ification sent chills down my spine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: I didn't even realize that I had forgotten all about her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: If he gets touched by sugar, I'm going to end up forgetting about Luffy in the same way!

summary: Luffy and Law Head for Doflamingo develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
